evidence.claim: Led migration from keyword-based to learning-to-rank model with embedded behavioral signals
evidence.source_text: led the migration from keyword-based ranking to a learning-to-rank model with embedded behavioral signals

evidence.claim: Handled peak QPS of 8K with sub-200ms p95 latency
evidence.source_text: handling peak QPS of 8K with sub-200ms p95

evidence.claim: Built RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month
evidence.source_text: Built a RAG-based ranking pipeline serving 50M+ queries per month

evidence.claim: Used BM25, BGE embeddings, FAISS HNSW, and LLM-based re-rankers
evidence.source_text: The architecture combined BM25 + dense retrieval (BGE embeddings, FAISS HNSW) with an LLM-based re-ranker

evidence.claim: Designed offline evaluation framework (NDCG, MRR, recall@K) calibrated against online A/B metrics
evidence.source_text: Designed the offline evaluation framework from scratch — NDCG, MRR, recall@K calibrated against online A/B engagement metrics.

evidence.claim: Led migration of 30M+ candidate corpus search system
evidence.source_text: Led the migration from keyword-based to embedding-based search across a 30M+ candidate corpus

evidence.claim: Improved recruiter engagement by 24% and reduced time-to-shortlist by 38%
evidence.source_text: The final embedding ranker improved recruiter engagement metrics by 24% and reduced the average time-to-shortlist by 38%.
Mentored two junior engineers through this rollout.

evidence.claim: Proficient in a wide range of ML/AI tools including PyTorch, LangChain, Pinecone, and pgvector
evidence.source_text: Skills: Vector Search, MLflow, Recommendation Systems, Databricks, Deep Learning, pgvector, Fine-tuning LLMs, Elasticsearch, QLoRA, Pinecone, Embeddings, Kubeflow, PyTorch, ETL, TensorFlow, NLP, Sentence Transformers, LoRA, LangChain

evidence.claim: Holds AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty and LangChain certification
evidence.source_text: Certifications: LangChain for LLM Application Development (DeepLearning.AI, 2018); AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2018)

evidence.claim: Reflective on past technical mistakes to improve future decision-making
evidence.source_text: I've made all the standard mistakes — embedding everything before defining the metric, over-investing in fine-tuning, optimizing offline metrics that don't move online — so I notice them faster now.
